title: PetroHSE Software Suite
summary: Led and contributed to the development of modules, workflows, and feature enhancements for an enterprise Health, Safety, and Environment (HSE) platform.
contributions: Built UI screens, reusable components, API integrations, and workflow-driven functionality.
impact: Integrated IVMS API for real-time vehicle tracking and deviation alerts, contributing to a 20% improvement in operational efficiency.

title: Management of Change
summary: Designed and developed a workflow-based application for PDO to manage change requests.
contributions: Built user-facing forms, workflows, and document attachment features.

title: DigLogist
summary: Developed a logistics management solution to automate and streamline delivery operations.
contributions: Developed full stack features for logistics management.

title: Risk Assessment Tool
summary: Built a web-based tool for identifying and assessing organizational risks.
contributions: Developed UI and backend integrations for risk logging.
impact: Contributing to a 25% reduction in risk incidents.

title: MASDAR
summary: Redeveloped subsurface data management interfaces for PDO.
contributions: Rebuilt legacy interfaces with modern stack components.
